user.title: Lovesac StealthTech
user.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of the StealthTech hub (find it with a BLE scanner; the device advertises the excelpoint.com service).

bluetooth_confirm.title: Lovesac StealthTech
bluetooth_confirm.description: Set up {name}? Note: the hub accepts only one BLE connection — close the Lovesac mobile app before pairing.

data_description.poll_interval: How often to connect and refresh state. The connection is dropped between polls so the Lovesac app can still connect.
data_description.idle_timeout: Seconds of notification silence before disconnecting.
data_description.my_couch_shape: Shown as the Couch Layout (raw) sensor state while its raw value is undecoded. Please also report your raw value + shape pairing at https://github.com/ojiudezue/ha-lovesac-stealthtech/issues so the shared table can ship it for everyone.
data_description.my_arm_style: Shown as the Couch Arm Type (raw) sensor state while its raw value is undecoded. Please also report the pairing at https://github.com/ojiudezue/ha-lovesac-stealthtech/issues.
data_description.my_fabric: Shown as the Couch Cover (raw) sensor state while its raw value is undecoded. Please also report the pairing at https://github.com/ojiudezue/ha-lovesac-stealthtech/issues.

unknown_enum_value.title: Unknown couch {kind} value {value}
unknown_enum_value.description: The StealthTech hub reports {kind} as raw value {value}, which is not in the shipped decoding table yet. Help decode it: open the learn-more link (a prefilled report form) and add what the Lovesac app or your eyes say your couch is. To label it locally in the meantime, set the matching override in the integration's options. Dismiss this issue if you are not interested.
